description:
The UnitSystemSwitcher component takes in one quantity type and converts it to another as a string. This is commonly used to make editors easily able to take any unit input and automatically know which one the user is referring to.

}}

fields.DefaultUnit: Changes the default unit to show in the text (especially if the ``FormatUnit`` is incorrect).
fields.FormatUnit: The unit to show in the text.
fields.CompoundFormatUnits: Compounds units together (example: feet and inches for height).
fields.CompoundUseLongNames: The field to drive with whether to use long names like "meters" instead of "m".
